system.powerDescription:
Leave behind psychic husks that are even visible to the mundane. Select yourself or any other sentient being that you can touch. You create a number of near-identical duplicates of your target equal to your ½ CAT. You can place them anywhere within range and move them as you please, but they cannot move on their own and cannot emote or speak. They can however be placed in a way that defies gravity such as on ceilings or walls without difficulty. When a creature other than you interacts with them, the duplicate is revealed to be hollow and paper thin before it crinkles away. 

Once per scene at any moment when you would take stress and a husk is still intact, you may negate that instance of stress and reveal that a husk has been attacked instead of you, while your real body is elsewhere. You cannot trigger this against severe attacks. 

This may easily affect the parameter of rolls such as difficulty or risk.
